title: Windows Network Share Discovery
description: Detects commands used to enumerate network shares. Attackers discover shared resources to identify sensitive data repositories, admin shares, and lateral movement paths.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*net.exe' and ('Command Line' like '*share*' or 'Command Line' like '*view*')) or (('Command Line' like '*Get-SmbShare*' or 'Command Line' like '*Get-FileShare*' or 'Command Line' like '*Get-WmiObject Win32_Share*')) or (('Command Line' like '*SharpHound*' or 'Command Line' like '*Invoke-ShareFinder*' or 'Command Line' like '*Find-DomainShare*')))
